content.speakerText: I should grab another drink — but it was really nice chatting with you!
content.speakerTextCn: 我去拿杯饮料，不过和你聊天真开心！
expectedAnswers: Same here! Let’s meet for lunch next week.
Totally! Enjoy your drink — I’ll text you later.
You too! Have a great evening — let’s not lose touch.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的积极情绪并自然提出后续联系
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，是否避免生硬表达
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常告别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'Let’s', 'next week', 'catch up', 'have a good one'

content.speakerText: It’s been so nice catching up — I’ve got to run now.
content.speakerTextCn: 和你聊天真开心，但我得走了。
expectedAnswers: Me too! Let’s grab coffee next time you’re in town.
You too! Take care — let’s stay in touch.
Absolutely! I’ll send you that article I mentioned.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否在告别时保持温暖并开启未来联系的可能性
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的动词短语（如 'grab coffee', 'stay in touch'）
表达自然度：是否避免了机械式回应（如 'Okay, bye'）或负面表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'Let’s', 'next time', 'stay in touch', 'take care' 等场景高频表达

content.speakerText: I’m heading out, but I really enjoyed our chat tonight.
content.speakerTextCn: 我要走了，但今晚和你的聊天真的很愉快。
expectedAnswers: Same here! Let’s plan a video call next week.
You too! Have a good one — I’ll message you about the event.
Thanks! It was great seeing you. Let’s not wait so long next time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否在结束对话时主动留下后续联系的线索
语言准确性：是否避免了中式直译（如 'We will meet again'）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的英语告别结构（如 'Have a good one', 'Let’s not wait so long'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'same here', 'let’s', 'next time', 'message you' 等核心表达
